prompt: A dramatic Japanese anime movie poster for a fictional cyberpunk sci-fi film, vertical one-sheet composition, centered on a young anime girl standing in a ruined neon-lit alley at night beneath a huge glowing full moon. She has a pale face, a serious melancholic expression, bright magenta-pink glowing eyes, and short teal-to-cyan hair in messy twin braids with wispy bangs and luminous highlights. She wears a dark futuristic school-uniform-inspired outfit: a fitted black top, pleated skirt, utility belt with holsters and hanging devices, a loose open coat with insignia patches on the sleeves, and a high-tech glowing collar or headset around her neck. One arm is visibly cybernetic with exposed machinery and pink energy glowing through transparent panels. Her chest has a circular neon core-like device emitting pink light. The environment is dense with holographic screens, broken signage, cables, shards, sparks, and floating pink-blue particles, with towering dark structures framing her and strong rim lighting from the moon behind her head. Use a moody palette of deep indigo, violet, black, cyan, and hot pink, with ultra-detailed painterly anime rendering, glossy reflections, cinematic contrast, volumetric light, drifting debris, and a haunting futuristic atmosphere. Include Japanese poster typography integrated into the artwork: on the right side, a tall vertical tagline in white with one key phrase highlighted in pink; on the upper left, exactly 3 stacked award blurbs in Japanese, each framed by laurel wreaths; near the lower middle, a small line of Japanese text above the title; a giant central title in white kanji reading 未来×回線 with a glowing pink X in the middle; directly below it, romanized subtitle text reading MIRAI KAISEN; below that, a pink Japanese subtitle line reading —終焉のコード—; near the bottom center, a single Japanese promotional sentence with one word highlighted in pink; at the bottom right, a large theatrical release date reading 7.18 with small [FRI] and ROADSHOW beneath it; and fine-print credits plus a copyright line along the bottom edge. Make it feel like a premium original animated feature poster, emotionally intense, polished, and award-winning.
